research_series.series_name: Microbiome and Microbial Ecology Variation Tree

core_interpretation: Microbiome data are cross-site ecological context, not a diagnostic layer. Functional/metabolite signals and paired host outcomes are stronger than diversity alone.
guardrails: Do not infer disease from low diversity alone.
Do not infer infection from pathogen DNA alone.
Do not infer gut-brain causality from microbiome shift alone.
Do not infer host colonization from environmental swab alone.
Do not compare microbiome profiles without sequencing/platform/diet/antibiotic context.
research_gaps: Sparse direct evidence linking environmental/ISS microbial shifts to astronaut health events.
Most microbiome-health links remain correlative rather than causal.
